title: Moderation update
body: We reviewed the current high-severity report queue and took action on two validated abuse cases. spam_wave_42 was removed for phishing spam posted across multiple channels, and toxic_runner was removed for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers. We also reviewed a brigaded false-positive report involving a maintainer and closed it without action against that member. The reviewed high-severity reports from this batch are now closed. Please continue reporting clear abuse in good faith; mass-reporting to punish routine moderation decisions will not be treated as evidence on its own.
